CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Closed") || ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Canceled"), TEXT(Brand_New_Program_Stamp__c), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( Brand_New_Program_Stamp__c ))), TEXT(Brand_New_Program_Stamp__c), TEXT( Combined_Funnel__r.Brand_New_Program__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Brand New Program
